content:
- We isolate vendor SDKs behind LLM adapters to keep core logic provider-agnostic.
- This makes it easy to switch providers (LiteLLM/OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic) without refactoring orchestration.
- Role-based prompts live in filesystem and are configured via app.yaml, enabling rapid iteration without code changes.
- Structured artifacts (Plan/Step/Result/Reviewer) are validated with Pydantic for reliability and easier persistence.
- Keeping prompts separate improves maintainability and supports environment-specific behavior.
